summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Koch snowflake with fractal dimension log 4/log 3 ≈ 1.2619. Initial equilateral triangle (side 3.6). ValueTracker level_tr steps 0..5 with always_redraw rebuilding BLUE snowflake via recursive Koch curve on each side. Live perimeter 3s(4/3)^n (→∞) and area (→ 2√3/5 · s²) readouts.
